primary_diagnosis:
Acute promyelocytic leukemia, AML M3 ID 01/26
Sanz risk classification: High risk
Initial blood count: L 5,00/nl, Hb 5,0 g/dl, Plt 5/nl
FISH: Detection of a translocation t(15;17)
Molecular genetics: PML::RARA pos.
FACS: CD45 low' SSC intermediate to high, CD34-' CD117+/- (low)' HLA-DR-' CD38+ (low),
CD33+' CD13+, CD64+ (99% in the blast gate, 85% the CD45+ cells)
Bone marrow aspiration:
Cytology: 70% promyelocytes, compatible with AML M3
FACS: CD45 low, SSC intermediate-high, CD34-, CD117+, HLA-DR-, CD38+, CD33+, CD13+,
CD64+ (95% in the blast gate, 95% the CD45+ cells)
Molecular genetics: PML::RARA pos.
Karyotype: 46, XX, t(15;17)(q24;q21) [7]
FISH: Detection of a translocation t(15;17)
question: Treatment initiation
tumor_board_decision:
Continuation of therapy with ATO/ATRA with high-risk APL under addition of HU 2g 2x
daily. No leukapheresis.
